THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CLEMMONS, JOSEPH SUED AS CLEMONS, JOSEPH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 947 SCOTT STREET, UPPER UNIT; SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL SEP-03-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT DOES NOT VACATE TIMELY, PLTF WILL HAVE AMENDED JDGMT FOR $8688.00 BACK RENT & UD DAMAGES OF $26.66 PER DAY FROM 8-1-96 THRU 9-3-96 PLUS $113 COSTS. DEFT TO RETURN KEYS BY 5 PM 9-3-96 & LEAVE PREM IN BROOM-CLEAN CONDITN. ANY PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED. SECURITY DEPOSIT FORF TO PLTF.

PLTF SUBMITTED JUDGMENT PERSUANT TO STIPULAT- ION SIGNED BY DEFT. ALL PARTIES INDICATE ON RECORD THEIR UNDERSTANDING AND ACCEPTANCE OF TERMS OF SETTLEMENT AS DETAILED IN JUDGMENT.
